purpose: Define the minimum evidence fields used to update discovery and execution states.

evidence_record_shape.observed_result: ALLOW / DENY / HOLD / FAIL_CLOSED / SANDBOX_REQUIRED / STALE_INCOMING_QUARANTINED / etc.
evidence_record_shape.route: ingest / sandbox_queue / failed_bundles / privileged_queue / installed_bundles / etc.
evidence_record_shape.state_implication: what this evidence implies about discovery/execution state

required_for_execution_state_advance: required receipts must exist or be emitted
